problem id: f15c5106
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  10011111 -> 11111011
  10101000 -> 00111010
  11011011 -> 10011101
  01101001 -> 00100110
  11101001 -> 00101110
  00100111 -> 10110110
  00010110 -> 00101111
  01110000 -> 01111111

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 00001110
